query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, publishedToFeed, awayBookSpread, bookTotal, awayModelSpread, modelTotal FROM games WHERE sport='NCAAM' AND gameDate='2026-03-26' AND awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL ORDER BY startTimeEst ASC;
